name: pinboard
description: Spatial bulletin board: a $space-shaped wall that holds movable $note objects. Pins are $pin < $note instances with an optional color; the board owns layout (x/y/w/h/z per pin) and presence. Pins can be taken off the board, dropped in rooms, picked up, and posted onto another board, all using ordinary $portable take/drop infrastructure. Subclass $pin for richer per-note behavior (voting, ephemeral, timestamped) without changing the board.

classes.description: Pinboard note. Adds an optional .color (default null, displayed white when null). Otherwise inherits all $note semantics: text, read/write/erase, is_readable_by, is_writable_by, look. Pins are first-class movable: take one off a board, drop it in a room, post it on a different board, recycle it. The pin remembers its color across moves.

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let text_summary = this:text_summary(96); let summary = "A sticky note."; let preview = text_summary["preview"]; if (preview) { summary = summary + " It says: " + preview; } return { id: this, title: this:title(), description: summary, lines: text_summary["lines"], location: location(this) }; }

verbs.name: set_color
verbs.source: verb :set_color(color) rx { if (color == "white") { color = null; } if (color != null && typeof(color) != "string") { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "color must be a string or null", value: color }; } if (!this:is_writable_by(actor)) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "cannot recolor pin", value: this }; } this.color = color; observe({ type: "pin_recolored", actor: actor, pin: this, color: color, ts: now() }); return true; }

classes.description: Shared spatial bulletin board. Holds $note descendants in .contents; tracks per-pin layout in a parallel map keyed by pin object id. Posting moves a pin into the board; taking moves it back to the actor's inventory. Board owners can :eject any pin; pin owners can :take their own. Subscribe to the board with :enter to receive incremental observations.

verbs.name: title
verbs.source: verb :title() rxd { return this.name + " on the wall"; }

verbs.name: look
verbs.source: verb :look() rxd { let view = this:look_self(); observe({ type: "looked", actor: actor, to: actor, room: this, target: this, text: view["summary"], look: view, ts: now() }); return view; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let pins = this:list_notes(); let note_count = length(pins); let other = []; for item in contents(this) { if (!isa(item, $note) && !isa(item, $actor)) { other = other + [{ id: item, title: item.name, description: item.description }]; } } let summary = this.name + " has " + to_string(note_count) + " note"; if (note_count != 1) { summary = summary + "s"; } summary = summary + " on it"; if (length(other) > 0) { summary = summary + " and " + to_string(length(other)) + " other thing"; if (length(other) != 1) { summary = summary + "s"; } summary = summary + " here"; } summary = summary + "."; return { id: this, title: this.name, description: this.description, summary: summary, note_count: note_count, notes: pins, contents: other, present_actors: this.subscribers, viewport: this.viewport }; }

verbs.name: enter
verbs.source: verb :enter() rxd { let old = location(actor); moveto(actor, this); let text = actor.name + " starts working at " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "pinboard_entered", actor: actor, board: this, origin: old, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return { room: this, present: this.subscribers, present_actors: this.subscribers, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: leave
verbs.source: verb :leave() rxd { let dest = actor.home; if (this.mount_room != null) { dest = this.mount_room; } if (dest == null) { dest = $nowhere; } moveto(actor, dest); let text = actor.name + " steps back from " + this.name + "."; observe({ type: "pinboard_left", actor: actor, board: this, destination: dest, text: text, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, text: text, ts: now() }); } return { room: dest, present: this.subscribers, present_actors: this.subscribers, here_request: true, look_deferred: true }; }

verbs.name: out
verbs.source: verb :out() rxd { return this:leave(); }

verbs.name: viewport
verbs.source: verb :viewport(x, y, w, h, scale) rxd { observe({ type: "pinboard_viewport", actor: actor, board: this, x: x, y: y, w: w, h: h, scale: scale, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: list_notes
verbs.source: verb :list_notes() rxd { let layout = this.layout; let pins = []; for pin in contents(this) { if (isa(pin, $note)) { let key = to_string(pin); let layout_entry = { x: 48, y: 48, w: 180, h: 110, z: 1 }; if (has(layout, key)) { layout_entry = layout[key]; } let color = null; if (typeof(pin.color) == "string" && pin.color != "white") { color = pin.color; } let text = []; try { text = pin:text(); } except err { text = []; } pins = pins + [{ id: pin, name: pin.name, text: text, color: color, owner: pin.owner, writers: pin.writers, x: layout_entry["x"], y: layout_entry["y"], w: layout_entry["w"], h: layout_entry["h"], z: layout_entry["z"] }]; } } return pins; }

verbs.name: acceptable
verbs.source: verb :acceptable(object) rxd { return isa(object, $note) || isa(object, $actor); }

verbs.name: enterfunc
verbs.source: verb :enterfunc(object) rx { if (!isa(object, $note)) { return true; } let key = to_string(object); let layout = this.layout; if (!has(layout, key)) { let z = this.next_z; this.next_z = z + 1; let count = length(layout) + 1; layout[key] = { x: 48 + ((count - 1) * 32), y: 48 + ((count - 1) * 26), w: 180, h: 110, z: z }; this.layout = layout; } observe({ type: "pin_added", actor: actor, board: this, pin: object, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, pin: object, text: actor.name + " pinned a note to " + this.name + ".", ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: exitfunc
verbs.source: verb :exitfunc(object) rx { if (!isa(object, $note)) { return true; } let key = to_string(object); let layout = this.layout; if (has(layout, key)) { let next = {}; for k in keys(layout) { if (k != key) { next[k] = layout[k]; } } this.layout = next; } observe({ type: "pin_removed", actor: actor, board: this, pin: object, ts: now() }); if (this.mount_room != null) { observe_to_space(this.mount_room, { type: "pinboard_activity", source: this.mount_room, board: this, actor: actor, pin: object, text: actor.name + " took a note from " + this.name + ".", ts: now() }); } return true; }

verbs.name: post
verbs.source: verb :post(pin) rx { if (!isa(pin, $note)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "only notes can be posted", value: pin }; } moveto(pin, this); return pin; }

verbs.name: drop
verbs.source: verb :drop(object) rx { let pin = object; if (typeof(object) == "string") { pin = $match:match_object(object, actor); } if (pin == $failed_match) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "You are not carrying " + object + ".", value: object }; } if (pin == $ambiguous_match) { raise { code: "E_AMBIGUOUS", message: "I don't know which " + object + " you mean.", value: object }; } if (location(pin) != actor) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "You are not carrying " + object + ".", value: pin }; } if (!isa(pin, $note)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "only notes can be dropped on the pinboard", value: pin }; } moveto(pin, this); return pin; }

verbs.name: take
verbs.source: verb :take(pin) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } if (pin.owner != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the pin's author may take it; board owners use eject", value: pin }; } moveto(pin, actor); return pin; }

verbs.name: eject
verbs.source: verb :eject(pin) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } if (this.owner != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only the board owner may eject pins", value: pin }; } moveto(pin, actor); return pin; }

verbs.name: move_pin
verbs.source: verb :move_pin(pin, x, y) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } let key = to_string(pin); let layout = this.layout; if (!has(layout, key)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "layout entry missing", value: pin }; } let entry = layout[key]; let z = this.next_z; this.next_z = z + 1; entry["x"] = floor(x); entry["y"] = floor(y); entry["z"] = z; layout[key] = entry; this.layout = layout; observe({ type: "pin_moved", actor: actor, board: this, pin: pin, x: entry["x"], y: entry["y"], z: z, ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: resize_pin
verbs.source: verb :resize_pin(pin, w, h) rx { if (location(pin) != this) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "that note is not on this board", value: pin }; } let key = to_string(pin); let layout = this.layout; if (!has(layout, key)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "layout entry missing", value: pin }; } let entry = layout[key]; entry["w"] = max(100, min(420, floor(w))); entry["h"] = max(72, min(320, floor(h))); layout[key] = entry; this.layout = layout; observe({ type: "pin_resized", actor: actor, board: this, pin: pin, w: entry["w"], h: entry["h"], ts: now() }); return true; }

verbs.name: add_note
verbs.source: verb :add_note(text, color, x, y, w, h) rx { if (typeof(text) != "string" || !text) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "add_note requires text" }; } let pin = create($pin, { owner: actor, name: "sticky note", description: "A sticky note. It says: " + text }); moveto(pin, this); pin:set_text([text]); if (typeof(color) == "string" && color != "white" && color in this.palette) { pin:set_color(color); } let key = to_string(pin); let layout = this.layout; let entry = layout[key]; if (typeof(x) == "number") { entry["x"] = floor(x); } if (typeof(y) == "number") { entry["y"] = floor(y); } if (typeof(w) == "number") { entry["w"] = max(100, min(360, floor(w))); } if (typeof(h) == "number") { entry["h"] = max(72, min(260, floor(h))); } layout[key] = entry; this.layout = layout; let note_record = { id: pin, name: pin.name, text: text, color: pin.color, owner: pin.owner, x: entry["x"], y: entry["y"], w: entry["w"], h: entry["h"], z: entry["z"] }; observe({ type: "note_added", actor: actor, board: this, pin: pin, note: note_record, ts: now() }); return note_record; }

seed_hooks.name: Pinboard
seed_hooks.description: A shared cork-backed pinboard mounted on the Deck wall. It is a visible object in the chat world and a separate coordination space where people and agents arrange durable text notes.
